products.name: Country Sourdough Boule
products.description: A naturally leavened country loaf with a crackly, blistered crust and a tangy open crumb. Cold-fermented for 24 hours. Approximately 1 lb.

products.name: Brown Butter Chocolate Chip Cookies
products.description: Thick bakery-style cookies made with browned butter, dark chocolate chunks, and a finishing sprinkle of flaky sea salt. Half-dozen per order.
